details: All 1st to 4th Job skills can be maxed
Put one SP into each skill first and then max each skill in this order
For any skills that have prerequisites, follow them first before following build path

notes: Any combination of these skills are good but preferred from same category as you want to max primary first

7 Boost Nodes total are needed to reach Master Level 60 for these skills (with Matrix Points used)<bp_Nodes with the same Main Skill (skill at the top) cannot be equipped at the same time_Each skill above should appear in 2 nodes_>

credits: Hyper Passive Build + Inner Ability + Boost Nodes Build

extraContent.title: Mana and Haku the Fox Familiar

primary.name: Blessing of the Five Elements
primary.shortDesc:
Permanently increases HP by 15%, Damage from enemies: - 20%
MP granted by equipment becomes HP instead
+1 Magic Attack for every 700 HP
[Magic Attack Increase: -]

primary.name: Hand of Fate
primary.shortDesc: Fan Weapon Mastery: +40%.

primary.name: Return of the Five Planets
primary.shortDesc: Returns you to Momijigaoka.\nCooldown 600 sec

primary.name: Haku the Familiar
primary.shortDesc: The mystical creature Haku follows you around everywhere. EVERYWHERE.\Cooldown: 10 sec
primary.desc: Allows you to hide/show Haku visual effect

primary.name: Hero's Echo
primary.shortDesc: Increases Attack Power & Magic ATT by 4% for 2400 sec\nCooldown: 300 sec
details: To obtain this skill, complete the quest <link href={https://maplestorywiki.net/w/Quests/58/Spiritual_Release} title={"Spiritual Release"}>

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Scores
primary.shortDesc: [1st Hit]: Damage: 150%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Attack Count: 2\n[2nd Hit]: Damage: 150%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Attack Count: 2\n[3rd Hit]: Damage: 180%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Attack Count: 2

primary.name: Commune
primary.shortDesc: [1st Hit]: Damage: 150%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Attack Count: 2\n[2nd Hit]: Damage: 150%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Attack Count: 2\n[3rd Hit]: Damage: 180%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Attack Count: 2

primary.name: Leap Talisman
primary.shortDesc: [Normal Teleport] Press a directional key and the skill key together to teleport a horizontal distance of 300 or a vertical distance of 400.\n[Mana Vein Teleport] Press the skill key when a Mana Vein is discovered and you'll immediately jump to one of the discovered Mana Veins\n[Random Teleport] Press the skill key in town to teleport to a random location. Mana Cost: 20
primary.desc: Teleport in the direction you are moving using the Arrow Keys
details: Can be used in the air and on ladders
When in town, pressing the Skill Key without any Arrow Keys teleports you to a random location within the map

primary.name: Summon Oni
primary.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 30, Duration: 30 sec. Summons the Ghost Yaksha Shikigami.
While summoned, the Ghost Yaksha repeatedly attacks up to 6 enemies for 120% damage 4 times.
Use the skill again while the Ghost Yaksha is summoned to instantly dismiss it, pulling in nearby enemies to be hit for 350% damage.
Cooldown: 3 sec

primary.name: Crimson Covenant
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases INT by 40 and Defense by 400.

primary.name: Clear Mind
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases INT by 40 and Defense by 400.

primary.name: Eternal Bonds
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases INT by 40 and Defense by 400.

primary.name: Spiritual Enlightenment
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases INT by 40 and Defense by 400.

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Icon
primary.shortDesc:
[1st Hit]: Damage: 170%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Attack Count: 2
[2nd Hit]: Damage: 170%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Attack Count: 2
[3rd Hit]: Damage: 210%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Attack Count: 2
[Spirit Warding Charm]: Activation Chance: 40% (non-boss enemies only). Duration: 6 sec, Speed Reduced by 60%, Damage: 105% per sec

primary.name: Evil's End Talisman
primary.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 50, Transformation Duration: 300 sec. Cooldown: 5 sec
Haku's Spirit Walker Skills
[Haku's Gift]: When Kanna's HP is below 90%, restores 50% of max HP. (Cooldown: 120 sec)
[Foxfire]: Summons a barrier made up of 3 wisps of foxfire for 30 sec. When Kanna is hit, the foxfire absorbs the damage instead, then attacks back by exploding for 800% damage. (Cooldown: 60 sec)
[Breath of the Unseen]: Kanna's final damage increased by 1% for each party member. (Always Applied)
[Haku's Blessing]: Increases the damage of party members by 10%.

primary.name: [Order] Spinning Strike
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40. Summons a dark cloud. Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 350%, Attack Count: 6, Duration: 3 sec. When enemies come in contact with the cloud, they receive 200% damage every 1 sec for 1 sec.\nCooldown: 3 sec

primary.name: Peacock's Plumage
primary.shortDesc: Increases the Attack Speed by 2 levels for 240 sec.

primary.name: Crimson Covenant II
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 25, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 180%, Number of Attacks: 4. Creates a vortex to attack enemies and flings you back.

primary.name: Ayanokouji Bloodline
primary.shortDesc: Hits enemies within a 150-pixel range of the defeated enemy. Max Enemies Hit: 4, Damage: 120%
primary.desc: Enemies defeated by you explode dealing damage to nearby enemies

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Spirit
primary.shortDesc: [Max Barriers Simultaneously Deployable]: 3\n[Mana Recovery Reduction Per Barrier]: 4

primary.name: Summon Tengu
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 20, Duration: 30 sec., Damage Reduction: 40%, HP Recovery: 10%, Status Resistance: +30\nCooldown: 120 sec.

primary.name: Shikigami Charm
primary.shortDesc:
[1st Hit]: Damage: 200%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Attack Count: 4
[2nd Hit]: Damage: 200%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Attack Count: 4
[3rd Hit]: Damage: 250%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Attack Count: 4
[Spirit Warding Charm]: Activation Chance: 60% (non-boss enemies only). Duration: 6 sec, Speed Reduced by 75%, Damage: 160% per sec

primary.name: Barrier: Curse Ward
primary.shortDesc: Each successful attack by Kanna has a 100% chance to summon Shikigami Charms, depending on the number of mobs hit. Shikigami Charms fly to nearby enemies, dealing 195% damage and leaving a mark that adds 5% to damage received from Kanna's attacks for 5 sec.

primary.name: [Order] Standby
primary.shortDesc: Magic ATT: +30, Critical Rate: +40%, Critical Damage: +20%, Final Damage: +30%

primary.name: Crimson Covenant III
primary.shortDesc: Restores 5% of Max HP for each enemy defeated. When attacking a boss enemy, restores 1% of Max HP every 4 sec.\nPermanently increases Status Resistance by 30%.

primary.name: Obsidian Feather
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 20. Summons the twin Tengu.\nThe Tengu will venture out as far as 600 to the left and right of Kanna, and attack up to 15 enemies for 400% damage 5 times.\nCooldown: 1 sec

primary.name: Spirit Path
primary.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 30, Duration: 30 sec. Summons the Ghost Yaksha Shikigami.
While summoned, the Ghost Yaksha repeatedly attacks up to 10 enemies for 200% damage 4 times.
Use the skill again while the Ghost Yaksha is summoned to instantly dismiss it, pulling in nearby enemies to be hit for 400% damage.
Cooldown: 3 sec

primary.name: Unshakeable Faith
primary.shortDesc: Uses 0% of Max HP to immediately recover 80 Mana.\nCooldown: 15 sec

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Dance
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 50, Transformation Duration: 500 sec. Cooldown: 5 sec
Haku's Spirit Walker Skills
[Haku's Gift]: When Kanna's HP is below 90%, restores 80% of max HP. (Cooldown: 120 sec)
[Foxfire]: Summons a barrier made up of 3 wisps of foxfire for 55 sec. When Kanna is hit, the foxfire reduces the damage by 40%, then attacks back by exploding for 1350% damage. (Cooldown: 60 sec)
[Breath of the Unseen]: Kanna's final damage increased by 1% for each party member. (Always Applied)
[Haku's Blessing]: Increases damage of your party members by 10%.

primary.name: Barrier: Spirit Chains
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 20, Duration: 30 sec, Damage: +20%, Boss Damage: +5%\nCooldown: 60 sec

primary.name: Heart-Wreck Talisman
primary.shortDesc:
[1st Hit]: Damage: 250%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Attack Count: 4
[2nd Hit]: Damage: 300%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Attack Count: 4
[3rd Hit]: Damage: 400%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Attack Count: 4, Mana Restored: 20, amount needed to activate Shikigami Doppelganger additionally increased by 5.
[Spirit Warding Charm]: Activation Chance: 100% (non-boss enemies only). Duration: 6 sec, Speed Reduced by 90%, Damage: 240% per sec

primary.name: Summon Orochi
primary.shortDesc: When activated, begins to accumulate Mana each time Kanna consumes Mana. Once charged with 260 Mana, this skill activates an attack that damages up to 8 enemies near Kanna, for 480% damage on each of 15 hits, 2 time(s).\nCooldown: 5 sec.

primary.name: Akatsuki Warrior
primary.shortDesc: Princess Sakuno appears\n[Passive Effect: All stats with a direct AP investment increase by 15%]
details: Skill is a passive, the active effect does nothing except displays an animation

primary.name: Hero's Will
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 5, Cooldown: 360 sec
primary.desc: Removes certain abnormal status effects and become immune to Abnormal Status for a few seconds

primary.name: Call of Unity
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 60, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 540%, Attack Count: 9, Duration: 150 sec, Damage Increase: 20%.\nCooldown: 120 sec\n[Passive Effect: When attacking while Nine-Tailed Fury is off cooldown, Haku attacks up to 6 enemies in front of him for 150% damage 3 times, at a 60% chance]

primary.name: [Order] Execute
primary.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 40, Duration: 30 sec. Summons the Ghost Yaksha Shikigami.
While summoned, the Ghost Yaksha repeatedly attacks up to 10 enemies for 240% damage 4 times.
Use the skill again while the Ghost Yaksha is summoned to instantly dismiss it, pulling in nearby enemies to be hit for 500% damage.
Cooldown: 3 sec

primary.name: [Order] Shade-Fletched Arrow
primary.shortDesc: Attack Chance: 30%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 160%, Attack Count: 1. Attacked Targets have a 30% chance to yield 30% additional EXP for 5 sec, and have an increased chance to drop equipment with potential. Also, when this effect is activated, the installed Kishin Shoukan's duration is increased by 5 sec.\n[Passive Effect: Kishin Shoukan Damage: +200% points, Knockback Resistance: +70%]

primary.name: Ivory Fang
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 50, Max Enemies hit: 15, Damage: 375%, Attack Count: 8. Hold the key down for up to approx. 4 sec to use 5 Mana per sec. Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 500%, Attack Count: 8.\nCooldown: 60 sec

primary.name: Obsidian Feather II
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 25, Max Duration: 10 sec, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 330%, Number of Consecutive Attacks: 5\nYou can move and jump while holding down the skill key.\nCooldown: 50 sec

primary.name: Crimson Covenant IV
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 60, Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 900%, Number of Attacks: 5\n100% of max HP recovered for yourself and nearby party members.\nCooldown: 20 sec

primary.name: Shikigami Master
primary.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 40, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 250%, Attack Count: 8, Stun Duration: 10 sec.\nDepending on the amount of damage dealt to enemies with Binding Tempest, the Stun Duration can be increased to up to 100%\nCooldown: 120 sec

primary.name: Kasen
primary.shortDesc: Fan Mastery: 70%, Damage: +30%

hyperPassive.name: Execute - Critical Chance
hyperPassive.shortDesc: Maximum number of Mana Veins that can be concurrently active increased by 1.

hyperActive.name: [Order] Pulverizing Strike
hyperActive.shortDesc: When the skill is activated, deals 500% damage to up to 15 nearby enemies at set intervals 1 times.\nNegates attack ignore and attack reflection effects.

hyperActive.name: Akatsuki Blessing
hyperActive.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 50, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 670%, Attack Count: 15, Stun Duration: 15 sec.\nDepending on the amount of damage dealt to enemies with Veritable Pandemonium, Stun Duration increased to up to 100%\nCooldown: 120 sec

hyperActive.name: True Name Revelation
hyperActive.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 50, Duration: 60 sec, Damage: +10%.\nOnly applies to Sengoku Warrior classes within the party.\nCooldown: 120 sec

fifthMain.name: [Spirit] Hakumenkonmou Juubi
fifthMain.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 40, Yuki-onna Duration: 50 sec. Yuki-musume assists Kanna, dealing 600% damage to 8 enemies 6-8 times. When Yuki-musume is summoned, Kanna's mana consumption is reduced by 50% and 2% HP is recovered on every attack.\nCooldown: 55 sec

fifthMain.name: [Spirit] Unleash the Radiant Flame
fifthMain.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 40, Spiritstone Duration: 40 sec, the Cursed Spiritstone grows more powerful with every 80 mana absorbed from the caster, and activates additional effects per stage when boosting Cursed Spiritstone (can be boosted up to 2 times)
[Basic Effect] Deals 540% damage to up to 15 enemies within range 9 times every 3 sec. Periodically restores 4% of Max HP/MP, Final Damage +5%, Status Resistance +26
[Boost Stage 1 Additional Effect] Boosts Basic Effect by 2x, party members within range gain 1 Attack Speed, caster's Boss Damage +50%, and the mana cost of the caster's skills is reduced by 50%
[Boost Stage 2 Additional Effect] Boosts Basic Effect by 3x, party members within range gain 2 Attack Speed, caster's Boss Damage +100%, and the mana cost of the caster's skill is reduced by 100%
Cooldown: 120 sec

fifthMain.name: [Spirit] Unleash Black-Winged Destruction
fifthMain.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 100, invincible during casting and disarmament
Duration: 40 sec. Open a portal to the underworld, calling forth the Great Lord himself.
If a 4th or below Ghost Yaksha is dismissed, sacrifice will be accumulated acccording to the amount of time the ghost was summoned. If the accumulated sacrifice reaches 30 sec+, the Great Lord can be summoned.
The Great Lord repeatedly attacks up to 15 enemies, for 900% damage, 5 time(s).
Upon re-using the skill, the portal will immediately close, and the Great Lord will perform his final attack, which attacks up to 15 enemies, for 1360% damage, 15 time(s)
Cooldown: 120 sec

fifthMain.name: [Spirit] Unleash Soul-Searing Venom
fifthMain.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 5, periodically summons a giant magic circle, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 295%, Number of Attacks: 15.
The magic circle will disappear either when it moves a certain distance or reaches the top of the map, and souls that deal 350% damage 15 times to 3 enemies will appear in up to 7 locations.
The giant magic circle summons souls in up to 11 locations.
Cooldown: 25 sec

masteryCore.name: 1st Mastery Node
details: Requires <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/shikigami-haunting-4.png} tip={Shikigami Haunting (4th Job)}> enhanced with V Matrix at least Lv. 40 (before Matrix Points) to unlock

masteryCore.name: HEXA Soul-Shatter Talisman: Dance
masteryCore.shortDesc:
[1st Hit]: Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 520%, Number of Attacks: 4
[2nd Hit]: Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 550%, Number of Attacks: 4
[3rd Hit]: Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 580%, Number of Attacks: 4
Restored: 5, amount needed to activate Shikigami Doppelganger additionally increased by 20.
[Spirit Warding Charm]: Activation Chance: 100% (non-boss enemies only). Duration: 6 sec, Speed: -90%, Damage: 400% per sec

[2nd Hit]: Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 550%, Number of Attacks: 4
[3rd Hit]: Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 580%, Number of Attacks: 4
Restored: 5, amount needed to activate Shikigami Doppelganger additionally increased by 20.
[Spirit Warding Charm]: Activation Chance: 100% (non-boss enemies only). Duration: 6 sec, Speed: -90%, Damage: 400% per sec

masteryCore.name: HEXA Summon Oni
masteryCore.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 40, Max Duration: 10 sec, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 608%, Number of Consecutive Attacks: 5
You can move and jump while the skill key is held.
Attacking with this skill has a 50% chance of creating additional Yosuzume.
Cooldown: 60 sec

masteryCore.name: HEXA [Order] Spinning Strike
masteryCore.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 40, Max Duration: 10 sec, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 608%, Number of Consecutive Attacks: 5
You can move and jump while the skill key is held.
Attacking with this skill has a 50% chance of creating additional Yosuzume.
Cooldown: 60 sec

masteryCore.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 40, Max Duration: 10 sec, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 608%, Number of Consecutive Attacks: 5
You can move and jump while the skill key is held.
Attacking with this skill has a 50% chance of creating additional Yosuzume.

masteryCore.name: 3rd Mastery Node
details: Requires <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/yosuzume.png} tip={Yosuzume (3rd Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/shikigami-doppelganger.png} tip={Shikigami Doppelganger (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/nine-tailed-fury.png} tip={Nine-Tailed Fury (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/nightghost-guide.png} tip={Nightghost Guide (4th Job)}> enhanced with V Matrix at least Lv. 40 (before Matrix Points) to unlock

masteryCore.name: HEXA Summon Tengu
masteryCore.shortDesc: Once the skill is learned, it accumulates a portion of the Mana that Kanna consumes. Once charged with 120 Mana, the skill activates an explosion that damages up to 12 enemies near Kanna, for 560% damage on each of 8 hits, 6 times.\nCooldown: 5 sec.

masteryCore.name: HEXA [Order] Shade-Fletched Arrow
masteryCore.shortDesc: Each successful attack by Kanna summons Shikigami Charms, depending on the number of mobs hit. Shikigami Charms fly to nearby enemies, dealing 480% damage and leaving a mark that adds 5% to damage received from Kanna's attacks for 5 sec.

masteryCore.name: 4th Mastery Node
details: Requires <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/kishin-shoukan.png} tip={Kishin Shoukan (3rd Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/tengu-strike.png} tip={Tengu Strike (3rd Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/ghost-yaksha-boss.png} tip={Ghost Yaksha Boss (4th Job)}> enhanced with V Matrix at least Lv. 40 (before Matrix Points) to unlock

masteryCore.name: HEXA Summon Orochi
masteryCore.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 20, Duration: 6 sec. Summons the demons Hana and Yuki. While summoned, the two demons ricochet an orb of energy between them to attack enemies caught in the crossfire. Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 700%, Number of Attacks: 4.\nCooldown: 30 sec.

masteryCore.name: HEXA [Order] Execute
masteryCore.shortDesc: Mana Cost: 20. Summons the twin Tengu.\nThe Tengu will venture out as far as 600 to the left and right of Kanna, and attack up to 15 enemies for 780% damage 5 times.\nCooldown: 1 sec

skillCore.name: [Divine Will] Advent of Crimson
skillCore.shortDesc:
Mana Cost: 40, invincible during casting
Haku transforms into a legendary form, dealing 25 shockwaves that deal 720% damage to up to 15 enemies 12 times. After, grants Kanna the Hakumenkonmou Blessing buff, lasting up to 10 seconds.
When Kanna consumes mana, Haku releases 5 shockwaves, dealing 500% damage to up 15 enemies 5 times. Kanna's mana accumulation from skills increases by 50%.
(Final Blow): Activates 12 Chase Cuts that deal (1070 + cumulative mana)% damage to up to 15 enemies within range 15 times, invincible during casting
(Increases the power of final blow by using up to 500 mana.)
Cooldown: 360 sec.

skillCore.name: [Divine Will] Final Rest
skillCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1000, Invincible during casting
Rains hail upon the enemy 12 times, dealing 8470% damage to up to 15 enemies 14 times
After a delay, a massive hail squall falls on enemies 12 times, dealing 7700% damage 15 times
Ignore Defense: +60%, Boss Damage: +40%, Critical Rate: 100%

boostCore.name: Spirit's Domain Boost
boostCore.shortDesc: Kanna's Boss Damage increases by additional 20% while receiving the effect of Spirit's Domain\n[Passive Effect - All Stats: +90]

boostCore.name: Ghost Yaksha Bosses' Boss Boost
boostCore.shortDesc: Ghost Yaksha Bosses' Boss Final Damage: +60%

meta: Kanna is an INT mage class part of the Sengoku class group. Kanna also uses a different resource than MP called Mana which her skill
